symlink traversal in test -ef denied by gbash sandbox
cp --attributes-only symlink replacement case requires following the copied destination symlink, which the default gbash sandbox denies
cp -H command-line symlink traversal is intentionally denied by the default gbash sandbox
cp dereference suite requires source symlink traversal, which the default gbash sandbox denies
cp --parents through a symlinked source directory requires symlink traversal, which the default gbash sandbox denies
cp source symlink dereference behavior is intentionally constrained by the default gbash sandbox
cp preserve-links hard-link-to-symlink case depends on symlink inode linking semantics unavailable under the default gbash sandbox
cp preserve-links cases that traverse symlinked sources are intentionally denied by the default gbash sandbox
cp /proc zero-length behavior depends on procfs semantics that are not mounted inside the gbash compat sandbox root
cp same-file GNU cases require symlink traversal that the default gbash sandbox denies
cp FIFO retry behavior deadlocks under the gbash compat sandbox
cp trailing-slash symlink cases require source symlink traversal, which the default gbash sandbox denies
ln hard-link-to-symlink cases require symlink traversal or symlink inode linking, which the default gbash sandbox denies
ln --relative cases require following source symlinks, which the default gbash sandbox denies
ln -sf same-file cases in the GNU suite require symlink traversal that the default gbash sandbox denies
mkdir -p through a symlinked directory requires symlink traversal, which the default gbash sandbox denies
touch -h symlink timestamp updates are not supported in gbash v1
touch not-owner cases assume a real filesystem root with host ownership and read-only semantics, but the gbash compat sandbox maps / to a writable temp root owned by the runner
touch trailing-slash cases require traversing symlink-to-file and symlink-loop paths, which the default gbash sandbox denies
head-c proc/sys cases depend on /proc/version and /sys/kernel/profiling being mirrored into the compat sandbox root, which is not reliable in the current GNU harness
split proc/sysfs test requires /proc/version and /sys/kernel/profiling, which are not mounted inside the gbash compat sandbox root
wc proc/sysfs test requires /proc/version and /sys/kernel/profiling, which are not mounted inside the gbash compat sandbox root
